commit.message:
MENUREGISTRY-EDITMENU-A2: add the Edit menu (Undo/Redo) via MenuRegistry

Option A step A2 (menu breadth). Add an Edit menu (Undo, Redo) driven by the
data-driven MenuRegistry, routed through the existing host->shell FIFO to the
bus undo/redo -- behaviour-identical to the existing Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y path. Per
the A2 scoping pass, Undo/Redo are the only menu items with BOTH a Command
variant AND a reachable shell action; View (camera), Play, and clipboard are
deferred (no reachable action -- the editor's Ctrl+2/0/4 are time-scale, not
camera). 2 source files + 1 test file; 0 Cargo.toml.

crates/editor-egui-host/src/lib.rs:
- build_file_menu_entries -> build_main_menu_entries: ONE MenuRegistry now
  declares BOTH editor.main_menu.file + editor.main_menu.edit, registers File
  (Open/Save/Save-As, unchanged) + Edit (Undo/Redo), resolves ONCE against an
  empty PredicateContext, and returns both projected (label, Command) lists.
  Default OrderHint::AtEnd => registration order; labels byte-identical.
- EguiHost gains edit_menu_entries (cached alongside file_menu_entries); new()
  destructures build_main_menu_entries() into both.
- render() borrows both as disjoint fields and renders a second
  menu_button("Edit") after "File" (same Panel::top -> MenuBar::new().ui).
- menu_tests: add Edit resolve + FIFO round-trip tests; File tests retargeted
  onto the (file, edit) tuple.
- Stale "per-frame re-resolve deferred to A2" comments -> "future dispatch"
  (A2 keeps resolve-once) per the Codex TASK review.

crates/editor-shell/src/render_path.rs:
- drain_and_route_menu_commands: add Command::Undo => undo_command() and
  Command::Redo => redo_command(), mirroring handle_key_command EXACTLY (swallow
  NothingToUndo / NothingToRedo, warn on other BusError). The drain doc + the
  unrouted-fallback message updated to include Edit Undo/Redo.

crates/editor-shell/src/lifecycle/tests.rs:
- menu_routing: add menu_undo_command_reverts_via_bus +
  menu_redo_command_reapplies_via_bus (bus dirty<->saved-point transitions prove
  the menu reaches undo_command / redo_command). menu_unrouted_command_is_noop
  switched from Command::Undo (now routed) to Command::Cut (still deferred) per
  the Codex TASK review.

from_key_press untouched; no shortcuts / AcceleratorTable / plugins / predicates
/ per-frame re-resolve; View / Play / clipboard / Reset-Camera deferred.

Gate: VERIFY OK 7/7 + 10/10 arch lints; cargo check --all-targets clean (no new
warnings); nightly fmt clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
